Author: Ajay Varma
Message: I cleaned up the monthly revenue grid to cleanly display the month and year without duplicate short-year text. I also updated the timeframe toggle to use a soft
column5: light blue background for active selections. Finally
column6: I implemented a GPU-accelerated CSS transform that provides a buttery smooth
column7: liquid-like sliding animation when you switch between different timeframes.

Author: Ajay Varma
Message: I optimized the Admin Analytics page for light mode by replacing hardcoded white styling with dynamic CSS variables
column5: ensuring empty states and table rows are perfectly legible. I also updated the SVG tooltips in charts like RevenueTrendChart to automatically invert colors based on the active theme. In the Admin Teams panel
column6: I unified the layout by wrapping the Month/Year filters and the Active/Historical member grids into a single
column8: I centered the 3M/6M/12M/All Time timeframe toggles across the team views and implemented a smooth
column9: iOS-style sliding pill animation for when you click between the different periods.
